_comment: Shared team config: pre-approved safe commands (fewer permission prompts) and a PostToolUse hook that auto-formats edited Dart files. Personal, machine-specific overrides go in .claude/settings.local.json (gitignored). See docs/agentic-workflow.md.
_model_comment: Project default: opusplan runs Opus in plan mode and Sonnet during execution; advisorModel lets Sonnet consult Opus on hard mid-task decisions (advisor must be >= main model; Anthropic API only, degrades gracefully on other tiers/providers). Override per-session with /model and /advisor.
